# F. Aamir Ali

> F. Aamir Ali is a student builder and founder from Surrey, British Columbia. He built and deployed an AI assistant inside his 1,500-student high school — recognized by the school's principal as the first student-built system of its kind there — and planned and executed the first youth AI summit in Surrey, which brought ~70 students from 14 schools together to build AI in a single day. He also founded and leads his school's AI & Innovation Club.

## Pages
- [About](https://faamirali.com/about): Full background — the short canonical record and the long first-person story.
- [FleetBot](https://faamirali.com/work/fleetbot): Two AI assistants built for a 1,500-student school — a student chatbot whose public beta ran on $2.76 with zero errors, and a staff assistant deployed on a front-office terminal that handled 150+ queries in its first 10 days. Full case-study PDFs for both builds.
- [Surrey Youth AI Summit](https://faamirali.com/work/surrey-ai-summit): The first youth AI summit in Surrey — a one-day event he planned and executed: ~70 students from 14 schools, a real sponsor, professional judges, and a UBC keynote.
- [AI & Innovation Club](https://faamirali.com/work/ai-club): The club he founded to teach students to build with AI — 20 members, a real build shipped every meeting.
- [Honours](https://faamirali.com/honours): The formal record — his principal's recommendation letter in full, plus certificates and scholarship wins as they're awarded.
